creator: david@wood2.org.uk
text:
Now that bsd.port.options.mk is available for use, I have added PERL and 
PYTHON to the OPTIONs of net/freeradius2 in PR ports/136254

I hope that this addresses your concerns.

Until bsd.port.options.mk was available, incorporating these OPTIONs 
into the port would have been very difficult, as many USE_ variables 
only work before including bsd.pre.port.mk.


With best wishes,




David
-- 
David Wood
david@wood2.org.uk
